contextNodes.label: EPPlus
contextNodes.description: A comprehensive .NET library for reading, writing, and manipulating Excel files (.xlsx) using the OpenXML format. Provides extensive Excel functionality including worksheets, formulas, charts, pivot tables, and conditional formatting through a dual-licensed NuGet package.
contextNodes.stats: Primarily C# with supporting XML and documentation files
contextNodes.purpose: Enables .NET developers to programmatically create and manipulate Excel files without requiring Microsoft Excel installation.

contextNodes.label: .NET Developers
contextNodes.description: Software developers integrating EPPlus library into .NET applications via NuGet package manager to programmatically read, write, and manipulate Excel files using C# APIs

contextNodes.label: Library Maintainers
contextNodes.description: EPPlus Software team members developing the library codebase, publishing NuGet packages, managing GitHub releases, and providing commercial support through direct channels

contextNodes.label: Documentation Users
contextNodes.description: Developers and technical writers accessing API reference documentation and usage guides through the DocFX-generated static website via HTTPS

contextNodes.label: NuGet Package Registry
contextNodes.description: Microsoft's package manager for .NET — EPPlus library is published and distributed via HTTPS REST API with package metadata and binary downloads

contextNodes.label: OpenXML SDK
contextNodes.description: Microsoft's SDK for manipulating Office Open XML documents — used as foundational dependency via .NET assembly references for Excel file format operations

contextNodes.label: .NET Runtime
contextNodes.description: Microsoft .NET runtime environment — provides execution platform and base class libraries via CLR hosting and framework APIs

contextNodes.label: GitHub Platform
contextNodes.description: Source code hosting and collaboration platform — hosts EPPlus repository with Git protocol access for version control and issue tracking via REST API

contextNodes.label: AppVeyor CI
contextNodes.description: Continuous integration service — builds and tests EPPlus library automatically via webhook triggers and REST API integration with GitHub

systemNodes.label: EPPlus Core Library
systemNodes.description: Main .NET library for reading, writing, and manipulating Excel files (.xlsx) using OpenXML format. Provides comprehensive Excel functionality including worksheets, formulas, charts, pivot tables, and conditional formatting. Distributed as a NuGet package with dual licensing model.
systemNodes.purpose: Main .NET library for reading, writing, and manipulating Excel files (.xlsx) using OpenXML format. Provides comprehensive Excel functionality including worksheets, formulas, charts, pivot tables, and conditional formatting. Distributed as a NuGet package with dual licensing model.

systemNodes.label: EPPlus Interfaces
systemNodes.description: Abstraction layer defining contracts for external integrations including HTTP services, drawing components, and sensitivity labels. Enables extensibility and dependency injection patterns for EPPlus consumers.
systemNodes.purpose: Abstraction layer defining contracts for external integrations including HTTP services, drawing components, and sensitivity labels. Enables extensibility and dependency injection patterns for EPPlus consumers.

systemNodes.label: Documentation Site
systemNodes.description: DocFX-based documentation website with API reference, articles, and usage guides. Generates static HTML documentation from XML comments and markdown files for EPPlus library consumers.
systemNodes.purpose: DocFX-based documentation website with API reference, articles, and usage guides. Generates static HTML documentation from XML comments and markdown files for EPPlus library consumers.

moduleNodes.label: core-excel-package
moduleNodes.description: Provides the main ExcelPackage class that manages OpenXML .xlsx files using System.IO.Packaging APIs. Implements worksheet management, cell operations, and formula calculation through a centralized CellStore data structure. Exposes public APIs for creating, loading, and saving Excel workbooks with comprehensive worksheet manipulation capabilities. Integrates with all other modules through dependency injection and event-driven architecture.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses factory pattern for worksheet creation, observer pattern for change notifications, and repository pattern for cell data management. Implements OpenXML SDK wrapper with custom CellStore for optimized memory usage. Provides fluent API design with method chaining for worksheet operations. Uses dependency injection container for module integration.

technicalSpecs.title: Storage Engine
technicalSpecs.details: Custom CellStore with sparse matrix optimization

keyDecisions: Custom CellStore implementation instead of direct OpenXML for better performance
Factory pattern for creating specialized worksheet components
Event-driven architecture for cross-module communication
moduleNodes.purpose: Serves as the primary entry point and orchestrator for all Excel file operations in the EPPlus library.

howItWorks.overview: Manages Excel workbook lifecycle through OpenXML package manipulation and centralized cell storage.

workflow.description: Load or create OpenXML package using System.IO.Packaging
Initialize CellStore for optimized cell data management
Parse worksheet XML into internal object model
Provide fluent API access to worksheet operations
Serialize changes back to OpenXML format on save

moduleNodes.label: formula-parsing-engine
moduleNodes.description: Implements a complete Excel formula parser and evaluator using recursive descent parsing with operator precedence. Supports 400+ Excel functions through a plugin architecture with function registry pattern. Handles formula compilation to expression trees and runtime evaluation with circular reference detection. Provides R1C1 and A1 reference style conversion with range dependency tracking.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses visitor pattern for expression tree traversal, strategy pattern for function implementations, and observer pattern for dependency tracking. Implements lexical analyzer with tokenization and recursive descent parser with precedence climbing. Provides function registry with lazy loading and caching for performance optimization.
keyDecisions: Recursive descent parser over ANTLR for better performance control
Expression tree compilation for repeated formula evaluation
Plugin architecture for extensible function library
moduleNodes.purpose: Parses and evaluates Excel formulas to provide calculation capabilities equivalent to Excel's formula engine.

howItWorks.overview: Tokenizes formula strings, builds expression trees, and evaluates with dependency tracking.

workflow.description: Tokenize formula string using lexical analyzer
Parse tokens into expression tree using recursive descent
Resolve cell references and external dependencies
Evaluate expression tree with function registry lookup
Cache results and track dependencies for recalculation

moduleNodes.label: drawing-graphics-system
moduleNodes.description: Manages Excel drawing objects including charts, images, shapes, and SmartArt using OpenXML Drawing ML format. Implements chart engine with 20+ chart types through factory pattern and supports image embedding with multiple formats (PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP). Provides drawing canvas with coordinate system transformation and anchor positioning. Integrates with IImageHandler and ITextMeasurer interfaces for cross-platform compatibility.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses factory pattern for chart creation, adapter pattern for image format handling, and composite pattern for complex drawing hierarchies. Implements OpenXML DrawingML serialization with custom coordinate system mapping. Provides extensible chart engine with pluggable renderers and data binding.

technicalSpecs.title: Image Support
technicalSpecs.details: PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP via IImageHandler

keyDecisions: OpenXML DrawingML over GDI+ for better Excel compatibility
Interface-based image handling for cross-platform support
Factory pattern for chart type extensibility
moduleNodes.purpose: Handles all visual elements in Excel workbooks including charts, images, and drawing objects.

howItWorks.overview: Creates and manages drawing objects through OpenXML DrawingML with coordinate transformation.

workflow.description: Create drawing object using factory pattern
Transform coordinates to Excel's measurement system
Serialize to OpenXML DrawingML format
Embed in worksheet relationship structure
Update drawing part in OpenXML package

moduleNodes.label: table-pivot-engine
moduleNodes.description: Implements Excel table and pivot table functionality using OpenXML Table and PivotTable schemas. Provides data source abstraction with LINQ-based querying and supports pivot field aggregation with custom calculation engines. Handles table formatting, sorting, and filtering through integration with filter-sorting module. Manages pivot cache and pivot table relationships with automatic refresh capabilities.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses repository pattern for data source management, strategy pattern for aggregation functions, and observer pattern for pivot cache updates. Implements LINQ provider for table querying with expression tree compilation. Provides pivot field hierarchy with drag-drop simulation and automatic layout calculation.
keyDecisions: LINQ provider for type-safe table querying
Strategy pattern for extensible aggregation functions
Automatic pivot cache management for performance
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables creation and manipulation of Excel tables and pivot tables with data analysis capabilities.

howItWorks.overview: Creates structured data tables and pivot tables with LINQ querying and aggregation support.

workflow.description: Define table structure with column metadata
Bind data source through LINQ provider
Apply filtering and sorting via filter-sorting module
Generate pivot cache for pivot table operations
Serialize table/pivot definitions to OpenXML

moduleNodes.label: conditional-formatting
moduleNodes.description: Implements Excel's conditional formatting system using OpenXML ConditionalFormatting schema with 30+ rule types. Supports color scales, data bars, icon sets, and formula-based conditions through a rule engine architecture. Provides priority-based rule evaluation with cascading format application and range intersection detection. Uses visitor pattern for rule serialization and factory pattern for rule creation.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses factory pattern for rule creation, visitor pattern for rule evaluation, and strategy pattern for format application. Implements priority queue for rule ordering with range quadtree for efficient intersection detection. Provides fluent API for rule configuration with method chaining.

technicalSpecs.title: Format Types
technicalSpecs.details: Color scales, data bars, icon sets, cell formatting

keyDecisions: Priority-based rule evaluation for Excel compatibility
Range quadtree for efficient rule intersection detection
Visitor pattern for extensible rule serialization
moduleNodes.purpose: Applies dynamic cell formatting based on cell values and custom conditions to enhance data visualization.

howItWorks.overview: Evaluates conditional formatting rules in priority order and applies formatting to matching cells.

workflow.description: Register conditional formatting rules with priority ordering
Evaluate rule conditions against cell values
Apply formatting using visitor pattern traversal
Handle rule conflicts through priority resolution
Serialize active rules to OpenXML format

moduleNodes.label: data-validation
moduleNodes.description: Implements Excel data validation using OpenXML DataValidation schema with input restrictions and custom error messages. Supports list validation, numeric ranges, date constraints, and custom formula validation through a rule-based validation engine. Provides client-side validation with error dialog customization and dropdown list generation. Uses event-driven architecture for validation state changes and range tracking.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses strategy pattern for validation rule types, observer pattern for validation events, and factory pattern for validator creation. Implements range quadtree for efficient validation rule lookup with event-driven validation state management. Provides fluent API for validation rule configuration.

technicalSpecs.title: Validation Types
technicalSpecs.details: List, numeric, date, text length, custom formula

technicalSpecs.title: Error Handling
technicalSpecs.details: Custom error messages with dialog styling

keyDecisions: Range quadtree for efficient validation rule lookup
Event-driven validation for real-time feedback
Strategy pattern for extensible validation types
moduleNodes.purpose: Enforces data entry constraints and provides user guidance through validation rules and error messaging.

howItWorks.overview: Applies validation rules to cell ranges and provides real-time validation feedback.

workflow.description: Define validation rules with constraints and error messages
Register rules in range quadtree for efficient lookup
Validate cell input against applicable rules
Generate dropdown lists for list-based validation
Serialize validation rules to OpenXML DataValidation

moduleNodes.label: encryption-security
moduleNodes.description: Provides Excel workbook encryption using AES-256 and digital signatures through X.509 certificates with XAdES standard. Implements password-based encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation and supports both legacy and modern encryption algorithms. Handles digital signature creation and verification with timestamp authority integration. Uses cryptographic service providers for cross-platform compatibility.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses factory pattern for encryption algorithm selection, adapter pattern for cryptographic providers, and chain of responsibility for signature validation. Implements PKCS#7 signature containers with XAdES extensions for enhanced security. Provides key management with secure key derivation functions.
keyDecisions: AES-256 with PBKDF2 for modern encryption standard
XAdES digital signatures for legal compliance
Cross-platform cryptographic provider abstraction
moduleNodes.purpose: Secures Excel workbooks through encryption and digital signatures to protect sensitive data and ensure document integrity.

howItWorks.overview: Encrypts workbook content and applies digital signatures using industry-standard cryptographic algorithms.

workflow.description: Generate encryption key using PBKDF2 from password
Encrypt workbook content with AES-256 algorithm
Create digital signature using X.509 certificate
Apply XAdES extensions for enhanced signature validation
Embed encrypted content and signatures in OpenXML package

moduleNodes.label: data-loading-functions
moduleNodes.description: Provides data import capabilities from various sources including CSV, JSON, DataTable, and IEnumerable collections using reflection-based mapping. Implements attribute-driven column mapping with EpplusTableAttribute and EpplusTableColumnAttribute for type-safe data binding. Supports bulk data loading with progress reporting and error handling through event-driven architecture. Uses factory pattern for data source adapters and strategy pattern for format conversion.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses adapter pattern for data source abstraction, factory pattern for format converters, and observer pattern for progress reporting. Implements reflection-based property mapping with attribute configuration and provides streaming data loading for large datasets. Uses strategy pattern for different data source handling.

technicalSpecs.title: Performance
technicalSpecs.details: Streaming data loading with progress reporting

technicalSpecs.title: Type Safety
technicalSpecs.details: Generic type support with automatic conversion

keyDecisions: Reflection-based mapping for type-safe data binding
Attribute-driven configuration for column mapping
Streaming approach for large dataset handling
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables efficient bulk data import from external sources into Excel worksheets with automatic formatting and validation.

howItWorks.overview: Maps external data sources to Excel worksheets using reflection and attribute-based configuration.

workflow.description: Analyze data source structure using reflection
Apply attribute-based column mapping configuration
Stream data into worksheet cells with type conversion
Apply formatting and validation rules
Report progress through event-driven callbacks

moduleNodes.label: export-functions
moduleNodes.description: Implements data export capabilities to various formats including CSV, JSON, HTML, and DataTable using template-based rendering. Provides customizable export templates with conditional formatting preservation and supports batch export operations with progress tracking. Uses visitor pattern for format-specific serialization and factory pattern for export handler creation. Integrates with drawing-graphics-system for image export in HTML format.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses visitor pattern for format-specific export logic, template method pattern for export workflow, and factory pattern for export handler creation. Implements streaming export for large datasets with memory optimization and provides customizable templates for output formatting.
keyDecisions: Template-based rendering for customizable output
Visitor pattern for format-specific serialization
Streaming export for memory efficiency
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables data export from Excel worksheets to multiple formats while preserving formatting and structure.

howItWorks.overview: Exports worksheet data to various formats using template-based rendering with format preservation.

workflow.description: Select export format and configure template
Extract data and formatting from worksheet
Apply format-specific serialization using visitor pattern
Stream output to target format with progress reporting
Handle embedded objects like images and charts

moduleNodes.label: style-formatting
moduleNodes.description: Manages Excel cell styling and formatting using OpenXML StyleSheet schema with comprehensive font, border, fill, and number format support. Implements style inheritance with cascading style resolution and provides style caching for performance optimization. Supports conditional formatting integration and custom number format creation with locale-aware formatting. Uses flyweight pattern for style object management and factory pattern for style creation.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses flyweight pattern for style object sharing, factory pattern for style creation, and composite pattern for complex formatting. Implements style inheritance hierarchy with cascading resolution and provides style caching with weak references for memory management. Uses strategy pattern for different formatting types.

technicalSpecs.title: Style Schema
technicalSpecs.details: OpenXML StyleSheet with full formatting support

technicalSpecs.title: Memory Management
technicalSpecs.details: Flyweight pattern with weak reference caching

technicalSpecs.title: Inheritance
technicalSpecs.details: Cascading style resolution with priority rules

technicalSpecs.title: Number Formats
technicalSpecs.details: Custom and built-in formats with locale support

keyDecisions: Flyweight pattern for memory-efficient style management
Cascading style resolution for inheritance support
Weak reference caching for automatic memory cleanup
moduleNodes.purpose: Provides comprehensive cell styling and formatting capabilities with Excel-compatible appearance and behavior.

howItWorks.overview: Manages cell styling through flyweight pattern with cascading style resolution and caching.

workflow.description: Create or retrieve style objects using flyweight pattern
Apply style inheritance and cascading resolution
Cache resolved styles with weak references
Serialize styles to OpenXML StyleSheet format
Apply locale-aware number formatting

moduleNodes.label: filter-sorting
moduleNodes.description: Implements Excel's AutoFilter and advanced filtering capabilities using OpenXML AutoFilter schema with custom filter criteria support. Provides multi-column sorting with custom sort orders and supports filter dropdown generation with unique value extraction. Uses LINQ-based query engine for filter evaluation and implements stable sorting algorithms for data consistency. Integrates with table-pivot-engine for structured data filtering.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses strategy pattern for different filter types, command pattern for sort operations, and observer pattern for filter state changes. Implements LINQ query provider for filter expression compilation with stable sorting algorithms for consistent results. Provides filter dropdown generation with unique value caching.

technicalSpecs.title: UI Elements
technicalSpecs.details: AutoFilter dropdowns with unique value caching

keyDecisions: LINQ-based query engine for flexible filter expressions
Stable sorting algorithms for data consistency
Command pattern for undoable sort operations
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables data filtering and sorting operations on worksheet ranges with Excel-compatible behavior and UI elements.

howItWorks.overview: Applies filtering and sorting operations using LINQ queries with Excel-compatible behavior.

workflow.description: Parse filter criteria into LINQ expressions
Generate filter dropdown with unique values
Apply filter expressions to data range
Execute stable sorting with custom comparers
Update AutoFilter state in OpenXML

moduleNodes.label: external-references
moduleNodes.description: Manages external workbook references and cross-workbook formulas using OpenXML ExternalReference schema with link management. Implements external range name resolution and supports external formula evaluation with dependency tracking. Provides link update mechanisms with broken link detection and repair capabilities. Uses lazy loading for external workbook content and caching for performance optimization.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses proxy pattern for external workbook access, lazy loading for performance optimization, and observer pattern for link state monitoring. Implements reference resolution with caching and provides link repair mechanisms for broken references. Uses factory pattern for external reference creation.
keyDecisions: Lazy loading for external workbook content
Proxy pattern for transparent external access
Link repair mechanisms for broken references
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables cross-workbook references and formulas while maintaining link integrity and performance.

howItWorks.overview: Manages external workbook links with lazy loading and automatic reference resolution.

workflow.description: Parse external references from formula expressions
Create proxy objects for external workbook access
Lazy load external content when accessed
Cache resolved references for performance
Monitor link integrity and provide repair options

moduleNodes.label: metadata-management
moduleNodes.description: Handles Excel workbook metadata including document properties, custom properties, and application-specific metadata using OpenXML Core Properties and Extended Properties schemas. Manages creation timestamps, author information, and revision tracking with version control integration. Provides metadata search and indexing capabilities with custom property type support. Uses reflection for automatic property discovery and serialization.
moduleNodes.architecture: Uses repository pattern for metadata storage, reflection for property discovery, and factory pattern for property type creation. Implements metadata indexing with search capabilities and provides version tracking with change history. Uses serialization for custom property persistence.
keyDecisions: Reflection-based property discovery for extensibility
Repository pattern for metadata persistence
Custom property type support for flexibility
moduleNodes.purpose: Manages document metadata and properties for compliance, tracking, and organizational purposes.

howItWorks.overview: Manages document metadata through OpenXML properties with automatic discovery and indexing.

workflow.description: Discover metadata properties using reflection
Serialize properties to OpenXML format
Index metadata for search capabilities
Track changes and maintain version history
Provide search and filtering on metadata

moduleNodes.label: http-service-interface
moduleNodes.description: Defines IHttpsService contract for external HTTP/HTTPS communication with async Task<Stream> Download method. Enables dependency injection of HTTP clients for downloading external resources like images or data files. Provides abstraction layer for network operations that can be mocked for testing or replaced with different HTTP implementations.
moduleNodes.architecture: Single interface contract following dependency injection pattern. Exposes async Download method accepting URL string parameter and returning Task<Stream> for downloaded content. Designed for implementation by concrete HTTP client classes that handle actual network requests and response streaming.

technicalSpecs.title: Interface Pattern
technicalSpecs.details: Single method contract for HTTP downloads

technicalSpecs.title: Async Support
technicalSpecs.details: Task<Stream> return type for non-blocking operations

keyDecisions: Async Task<Stream> return type for efficient memory usage with large downloads
Single Download method interface keeps contract minimal and focused
moduleNodes.purpose: Abstracts HTTP/HTTPS download operations to enable testable and pluggable network communication.

howItWorks.overview: Interface contract for HTTP download operations with async streaming support.

workflow.description: Consumer injects IHttpsService implementation via dependency injection
Call Download method with target URL string parameter
Implementation performs HTTP GET request and returns response as Stream
Consumer processes downloaded content from returned Task<Stream>

moduleNodes.label: drawing-interfaces
moduleNodes.description: Defines contracts for image handling and text measurement operations in Excel drawings. IImageHandler provides GetImageBounds method for extracting dimensions from various image formats (BMP, JPG, GIF, PNG). ITextMeasurer enables font-aware text dimension calculations using MeasurementFont and MeasurementFontStyles data structures. Includes ePictureType enum defining supported image formats for drawing operations.
moduleNodes.architecture: Two primary interfaces (IImageHandler, ITextMeasurer) with supporting value types and enums. Both interfaces include ValidForEnvironment property for platform detection. MeasurementFont encapsulates font family, size, and style properties. TextMeasurement value type returns width/height dimensions as double values.

technicalSpecs.title: Image Formats
technicalSpecs.details: BMP, JPG, GIF, PNG via ePictureType enum

technicalSpecs.title: Font Styles
technicalSpecs.details: Regular, Bold, Italic, Underline via MeasurementFontStyles flags

technicalSpecs.title: Measurement Types
technicalSpecs.details: Double precision width/height in TextMeasurement struct

technicalSpecs.title: Platform Detection
technicalSpecs.details: ValidForEnvironment boolean for runtime handler selection

keyDecisions: Separate interfaces for image and text operations to follow single responsibility principle
ValidForEnvironment property enables runtime platform detection and handler selection
Value types for font and measurement data to minimize allocation overhead
moduleNodes.purpose: Abstracts platform-specific drawing operations for images and text to enable cross-platform Excel rendering.

howItWorks.overview: Interface contracts for platform-specific drawing operations with environment validation.

workflow.description: Check ValidForEnvironment property to determine handler compatibility
For images: call GetImageBounds with byte array to extract dimensions
For text: create MeasurementFont with family, size, and style properties
Call MeasureText with text string and font to get TextMeasurement dimensions

moduleNodes.label: sensitivity-label-interfaces
moduleNodes.description: Defines contracts for Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) sensitivity label integration in Excel documents. ISensitivityLabelHandler provides async methods for initializing MIP SDK and decrypting protected packages. IExcelSensibilityLabel represents label metadata with Id, Name, Description, and Tooltip properties. IPackageInfo encapsulates package stream, protection information, and active label ID for encrypted Excel files.
moduleNodes.architecture: Primary handler interface (ISensitivityLabelHandler) with async Task-based methods for MIP operations. Label data contracts (IExcelSensibilityLabel, IExcelSensibilityLabelUpdate) define metadata structure. IPackageInfo provides access to encrypted package streams and protection details. Enums define content bits (Header, Footer, Watermark) and encryption methods (Standard, Privileged).

technicalSpecs.title: MIP Integration
technicalSpecs.details: Microsoft Information Protection SDK async operations

technicalSpecs.title: Encryption Methods
technicalSpecs.details: Standard and Privileged via eMethod enum

technicalSpecs.title: Content Markings
technicalSpecs.details: Header, Footer, Watermark via eContentBits flags

keyDecisions: Async Task-based methods for MIP SDK integration to handle potentially slow encryption operations
Separate interfaces for read-only labels and updatable labels to enforce immutability patterns
eContentBits flags enum enables granular control over label visual elements
moduleNodes.purpose: Enables integration with Microsoft Information Protection for applying and managing sensitivity labels on Excel documents.

howItWorks.overview: Interface contracts for Microsoft Information Protection SDK integration with async encryption/decryption support.

workflow.description: Call InitAsync to initialize MIP SDK with authentication context
Use DecryptPackageAsync with package stream and label ID for protected documents
Access label metadata via IExcelSensibilityLabel properties (Id, Name, Description)
Apply content markings based on eContentBits flags (Header, Footer, Watermark)
Update label properties via IExcelSensibilityLabelUpdate.Update method

moduleNodes.label: api-documentation
moduleNodes.description: DocFX-based web application that generates static HTML API reference documentation from XML documentation comments in EPPlus source code. Processes .NET XML doc files through DocFX's metadata extraction pipeline to create searchable API documentation with IntelliSense-style tooltips. Renders class hierarchies, method signatures, and parameter descriptions using DocFX's default template with custom CSS styling. Outputs static HTML files optimized for web hosting and offline browsing.
moduleNodes.stats: DocFX - Static site generator - API reference
moduleNodes.architecture: DocFX metadata extraction pipeline processes .NET XML documentation files to generate static HTML documentation. Uses DocFX's built-in .NET API documentation template with custom CSS overrides for EPPlus branding. Implements a build-time generation workflow that parses source code XML comments and outputs hierarchical HTML documentation with cross-reference linking. Integrates with CI/CD pipeline for automated documentation updates on library releases.

technicalSpecs.title: Generator
technicalSpecs.details: DocFX static site generator with .NET API template

technicalSpecs.title: Output Format
technicalSpecs.details: Static HTML with JavaScript search functionality

technicalSpecs.title: Styling
technicalSpecs.details: Custom CSS overrides on DocFX default template

keyDecisions: DocFX chosen over Sandcastle for better .NET Core support and modern HTML output
XML documentation comments used as single source of truth for API documentation
Static HTML generation preferred over dynamic documentation for better performance and hosting flexibility
moduleNodes.purpose: Generates comprehensive API reference documentation from EPPlus library source code XML comments for developer consumption.

howItWorks.overview: DocFX scans EPPlus source code for XML documentation comments and generates static HTML API reference documentation.

workflow.description: DocFX metadata tool extracts XML documentation from EPPlus assembly files
Metadata processor builds object model of classes, methods, and properties with documentation
Template engine applies DocFX default template with EPPlus custom styling
Static HTML generator outputs hierarchical documentation with search index
Cross-reference resolver links API members to related documentation pages

moduleNodes.label: user-guides
moduleNodes.description: DocFX-based web application that transforms Markdown articles into static HTML documentation covering EPPlus usage patterns, tutorials, and best practices. Processes Markdown files through DocFX's conceptual documentation pipeline with custom table of contents generation and cross-linking. Implements code syntax highlighting for C# examples using Prism.js and provides downloadable sample projects. Generates responsive HTML documentation with navigation breadcrumbs and search functionality.
moduleNodes.architecture: DocFX conceptual documentation pipeline processes Markdown files with YAML front matter to generate structured HTML documentation. Uses DocFX's article template system with custom navigation components and code example formatting. Implements a hierarchical content organization with automatic table of contents generation and inter-article linking. Integrates Prism.js for C# syntax highlighting and provides embedded code examples with copy-to-clipboard functionality.

technicalSpecs.title: Content Format
technicalSpecs.details: Markdown with YAML front matter for metadata

keyDecisions: Markdown chosen over reStructuredText for better developer familiarity and GitHub integration
DocFX conceptual template used for consistent styling with API documentation
Embedded code examples preferred over external links for better user experience
moduleNodes.purpose: Provides comprehensive usage guides and tutorials to help developers effectively use the EPPlus library.

howItWorks.overview: DocFX processes Markdown articles with YAML metadata to generate structured HTML user documentation with navigation and search.

workflow.description: DocFX scans articles directory for Markdown files with YAML front matter
Markdown processor converts content to HTML with syntax highlighting for code blocks
Table of contents generator creates hierarchical navigation from file structure
Template engine applies conceptual documentation template with custom styling
Cross-reference processor links articles to API documentation and other guides
